ABOUT
Float's Sandbox v4.0 Isometric Edition

A colorful Garry's Mod-inspired sandbox world! Spawn props, build structures, use tools, and have fun with friends on LAN!

Features: Isometric 2.5D Camera, PNG Characters, 12 Maps, Q Spawn Menu, Physgun, Tool Gun, Paint, Freeze, Duplicator, Remover, 100+ Spawnable Props, LAN Multiplayer, Enterable Buildings, Save/Load, Weather, Friendly NPCs, Hopeful Soundtrack, Paper Mario Art Style

100% Spaghetti Code. Made with love and noodles.
